title: pilosella erythriophylla subsp. scepusiensis
intro: Pilosella erythriophylla subsp. scepusiensis is a subspecies of the Pilosella erythriophylla plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella erythriophylla subsp. scepusiensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, or topical creams that can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
